title: Episode 1
overview: Murai is in love with his teacher, Tanaka. After a haircut, he resembles her favorite character.

title: Episode 2
overview: In return for borrowing the game Sengoku Koi Emaki, Murai participates in the Doujinshi Convention.

title: Episode 3
overview: Tanaka, believing Murai deceived her, runs away from the convention only to run into his friends.

title: Episode 4
overview: Yayoi Fukunaga has a happy reunion with Murai, until she finds out he is in love with someone else.

title: Episode 5
overview: Tanaka admits to being worried about Murai. Murai asks for three seconds in return for forgiveness.

title: Episode 6
overview: Tanaka is worried about Murai dozing off in class. Learning the reason behind it, she goes to him.

title: Episode 7
overview: The school festival begins. Murai struggles to beat Tanaka's brother, Mao, to gain his approval.

title: Episode 8
overview: Murai is upset when Yamakado, the second-year head teacher, shows up for homeroom instead of Tanaka.

title: Episode 9
overview: Tanaka wakes up to find herself at Yamakado's house. Yamakado does something unexpected.

title: Episode 10
overview: Yamakado asks Tanaka about her relationship with Murai. Something starts to change in Tanaka.

title: Episode 11
overview: Murai and Tanaka are caught hugging each other on TV. Kiriyama and Yamakado try to save them.

title: Episode 12
overview: As a child, Murai met and fell in love with Tanaka, but she never realized that the boy was Murai.
